subcodes.title: Words to Lua Getsinger, spoken on 1913-11-10
subcodes.first_line: When thou dost enter a city in India, associate with the people in the beginning as a tourist, as a person interested in India
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @methods of teaching the Cause
